name: Delaware Registered Construction Contractors Public Lookup
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the public lookup before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: construction contractor registrations exposed by the Delaware public lookup
knownExclusions: The public lookup is a construction contractor registry and does not represent every Delaware professional, trade, municipal, or business license.
Individual professional licenses are handled through separate Delaware professional licensing systems.
Contractors absent from the registry may be under review, removed, suspended, revoked, or outside the registry scope.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate lookup traffic unless official terms and technical controls are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, registration, or authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Delaware registered construction contractors. Future adapter research should preserve the public lookup disclaimer in verification output.
maintainerNotes: Keep Delaware contractor registry scope separate from DELPROS professional-license records and Division of Revenue business licenses.
